recommendations.title: Sandy Wexler
recommendations.overview: When a hapless but dedicated talent manager signs his first client who actually has talent, his career finally starts to take off.

recommendations.title: Sisters
recommendations.overview: Two disconnected sisters are summoned to clean out their childhood bedrooms before their parents sell their family home.

recommendations.title: Dirty Girl
recommendations.overview: Accompanied by her closeted gay buddy, a promiscuous teenager sets out to find her long-absent father.

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Home Alone
recommendations.overview: After being left at home by himself for the holidays, 10-year-old Max Mercer must work to defend his home from a married couple who tries to steal back a valuable heirloom.

recommendations.title: In Bed with Victoria
recommendations.overview: Victoria is a thirty-something divorced lawyer who's struggling to raise her two daughters. She is canny and cynical but on the verge of an emotional breakdown. At a friend's wedding she reconnects with Vincent, an old friend, and Sam, an old client.

recommendations.title: Broadway Danny Rose
recommendations.overview: A hapless talent manager named Danny Rose, by helping a client, gets dragged into a love triangle involving the mob. His story is told in flashback, an anecdote shared amongst a group of comedians over lunch at New York's Carnegie Deli. Rose's one-ma

recommendations.title: The Graduate
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned college graduate finds himself torn between his older lover and her daughter.

recommendations.title: Poms
recommendations.overview: After moving to a retirement community, loner Martha eventually befriends her fun-loving neighbor, Sheryl, and forms a cheerleading club for young-at-heart seniors, though they face roadblocks along the way.

recommendations.title: The Confirmation
recommendations.overview: A divorced father reconnects with his son when they track down a stolen toolbox over the course of a weekend.

recommendations.title: Finding ʻOhana
recommendations.overview: Two Brooklyn siblings' summer in a rural Oahu town takes an exciting turn when a journal pointing to long-lost treasure sets them on an adventure, leading them to reconnect with their Hawaiian heritage.
